name: exam-integrity-model
description: A demonstration toolkit for document/exam integrity supply chains: a SHA-256 hash-chained custody log, a genuine Shamir's Secret Sharing (k-of-n threshold) implementation, and a live text-similarity detector.

scripts.lint: node --check src/custody-chain.js && node --check src/shamir.js && node --check src/similarity.js && node --check demo/app.js
